vocab.example: I gravitate towards white sneakers because they are incredibly versatile and can be paired with almost any outfit.

vocab.meaning: ưu tiên sự thoải mái hơn là vẻ ngoài
vocab.example: As someone who walks a lot, I tend to prioritize comfort over style when selecting a new pair of shoes.
While these leather boots are aesthetically pleasing, they can be quite painful to wear for extended periods.
I’m a huge fan of running shoes that provide excellent cushioning to protect my joints during workouts.

vocab.meaning: người cực kỳ thích cái gì đó (không cưỡng lại được)
vocab.example: I must admit I'm a sucker for limited-edition sneakers, even if they cost a fortune.
When buying formal shoes, I look for high-quality leather to ensure long-term durability.

vocab.meaning: một sự khẳng định về phong cách thời trang
vocab.example: For me, a bold pair of heels isn't just footwear; it's a fashion statement that boosts my confidence.
In a tropical climate like ours, shoes made of breathable material are an absolute must to stay comfortable.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế công thái học (vừa vặn, hỗ trợ cơ thể)
vocab.example: These trainers feature an ergonomic design that offers superb arch support for long-distance walking.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn hàng đầu, lựa chọn quen thuộc
vocab.example: Canvas slip-ons are my go-to choice for casual outings due to their sheer convenience.
